issue_summary: * TokenizerFactory.create(Reader) is made final, and calls the AttributeFactory-accepting version with AttributeFactory.DEFAULT_ATTRIBUTE_FACTORY * TokenizerFactory.create(AttributeFactory, Reader) is made abstract * Added AttributeFactory-accepting constructors to all Tokenizer's with existing TokenizerFactory subclasses that didn't already have them * Removed create(Reader) from all TokenizerFactory subclasses
javadoc_before: /** Creates a TokenStream of the specified input */
javadoc_after: /** Creates a TokenStream of the specified input using the default attribute factory. */
